payload.answer: I found a conflict: Sara is currently recorded as your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify whether this is the same Sara, a different Sara, or whether the earlier relationship should be corrected.

entity_resolution.reason: The name 'Sara' matches an existing person entity, but the new relationship ('niece') conflicts with the existing relationship ('daughter') if referring to the same Sara.

details: No durable memory was written because the new statement conflicts with an existing relationship.

repair_options: Keep Sara as your daughter and ignore the new niece relationship.
Replace the existing relationship so Sara is recorded as your niece instead of your daughter.
Create a separate person entry for another Sara who is your niece.
Record both relationships only if you confirm both are true in your family context.
